name: Radius Recycling
description: Radius Recycling, formerly known as Schnitzer Steel Industries, is one of the largest manufacturers and exporters of recycled metal products in North America. Founded in 1906, the company operates an integrated platform that includes scrap metal recycling facilities, deep-water export terminals, and retail stores selling used auto parts. Additionally, Radius Recycling manufactures finished steel products, including rebar, wire rod, and merchant bar, using electric arc furnace technology. Committed to sustainability, the organization leverages over a century of expertise to provide essential circular economy solutions, processing millions of tons of ferrous and non-ferrous metals annually across its extensive operational network.
